summary: Iteration 4 testing completed successfully. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). New Stripe payment and Twilio SMS integrations tested and working. Integrations page shows 5 active integrations (Stripe, Twilio, Webhooks, Zoom, Calendly) and 11 coming soon. Communications page SMS tab working with Compose SMS modal. Giving page Stripe checkout panel working with amount selection, fund designation, recurring option.

details: Invalid amounts correctly rejected with 400/520 status
GET /api/payments/status/{session_id} returns status, payment_status, amount, currency
Invalid session IDs correctly return error status
Response includes status: 'queued', to: recipient phone
Mock mode indicated with mock: true flag
Works in mock mode when Twilio not configured
Templates: Welcome Message, Event Reminder, Giving Thank You, Group Meeting Reminder
Each template has id, name, content, category fields
Filter buttons: All (16), Active (5), Coming Soon (11)
Integration cards found: Stripe, Twilio, Webhooks, Zoom, Calendly
Categories: Payments & Giving, Communication, Automation, Background Checks, Video & Streaming, Scheduling, AI & Productivity
All filter button shows all 16 integrations
Coming Soon filter shows 11 upcoming integrations
SMS tab displays SMS Overview stats (0 Messages Sent MTD, 98% Delivery Rate, 4 Templates, $0.00 Cost)
Compose SMS button opens SMSComposer modal
SMS Composer has Individual/Group mode toggle
Message textarea with 160 char limit counter
Panel title: 'Make a Gift' with 'Secure payment via Stripe' subtitle
'Make this a monthly recurring gift' checkbox present
'Continue to Payment' button triggers Stripe checkout

seed_data_creation: Using existing seeded data from iteration 3.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe payments integration working - creates real Stripe checkout URLs (test mode with sk_test_emergent key). Twilio SMS is in MOCK MODE (Twilio credentials not configured). Integrations page showcases 5 active + 11 coming soon integrations. PayPal, Venmo, Zelle, Crypto are PLACEHOLDER links.

mocked_apis_note.Twilio SMS: MOCK MODE - returns mock message_id, no actual SMS sent
